title: USS Abraham Lincoln Departs Philippines for Middle East
detail: USS Abraham Lincoln (CVN-72) carrier strike group departs Subic Bay, Philippines, heading west toward the Middle East. The strike group includes guided-missile cruiser USS Mobile Bay, destroyers USS Halsey and USS O'Kane, and Carrier Air Wing 9. The transit signals the beginning of a major US force buildup in the CENTCOM area of responsibility.

title: Iran Warns US Against Military Interference
detail: Iran's Foreign Minister issues a statement warning the United States that any military intervention would be met with 'devastating consequences for the entire region.' The IRGC puts its naval forces in the Persian Gulf on heightened alert. Iran's navy begins exercises near the Strait of Hormuz, described by state media as 'routine' but widely seen as a signal.
